data.title: Assemble Expands for the Era of Peer Intelligence
data.description: The company is expanding its communities, events, content, and leadership team to address the increasing complexity of executive decision-making. In Toronto on April 27, 2026, it was stated that senior leaders are facing a decision, not an information, problem. The company is adapting to this challenge by enhancing its resources.
Hanzala Cyber Group: US Navy will be“more vulnerable than any other organization in coming hours - Fars News

data.title: Medical Clinic of Houston Internist and Geriatrician Holly Holmes, MD, MS, AGSF Offers Patients the Concierge Choice Program from Concierge Choice Physicians
data.description: Enrolling patients will benefit from increased time, specialized care, and personal attention from geriatrician Dr. Holly Holmes, MD, MS, AGSF in Rockville Centre, New York. On April 27, 2026, Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP) announced that patients will receive exclusive one-on-one access to Dr. Holmes through their comprehensive concierge medical service.

data.title: Nervonik Announces $52.5 Million Series B Financing to Advance Peripheral Nerve Stimulation Therapy
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Los Angeles-based Nervonik, Inc., a company specializing in advanced peripheral nerve stimulation (PNS) technologies, declared the completion of a Series B financing round generating $52.5 million. The funding, which exceeded the set target, was predominantly overseen by Amzak.

data.title: Gaia Sets First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for Monday, May 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, Gaia, Inc. (NASDAQ: GAIA), the leading conscious streaming platform globally, offering 10,000 videos focusing on health, wellness, and spiritual development, has scheduled a conference call on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EST (2:30 p.m. MST) to review its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The comprehensive financial report will be disclosed in a press release ahead of the call.

data.title: Greenland Mines Appoints SLR Consulting as Geological Consultant and Qualified Person for Skaergaard
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Greenland Mines Ltd (Nasdaq: GRML) revealed the selection of SLR Consulting as the geological consultant and Qualified Person for their Skaergaard Project in East Greenland. This decision marks a significant step for the company's operations in the region.

data.title: IRADIMED CORPORATION to Hold First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on May 1, 2026
data.description: Iradimed Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as IRMD, disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 before the market opens on May 1, 2026, in Orlando, Florida. Following this announcement, the management will conduct a conference call starting at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to provide insights into the results and address any queries from stakeholders.

data.title: Tenaya Therapeutics Announces Late-Breaking Oral Presentation of New Clinical Data from RIDGE™-1 Phase 1b/2 Clinical Trial of TN-401 Gene Therapy in Adults with PKP2-Associated ARVC at ASGCT 2026
data.description: In South San Francisco on April 27, 2026, Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNYA), a clinical-stage biotechnology company, shared that it will present several abstracts at the American Society of Gene and Cell Therapy (ASGCT) Annual Meeting in Boston, Massachusetts, from May 11-15, 2026. The company highlighted that fresh clinical data from two dose groups in the RIDGE-1 Phase 1b/2 trial of TN-401 will be showcased as a late-breaking oral presentation at the event. This presentation marks a significant step forward in Tenaya's pursuit of developing potentially curative therapies for heart disease.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) Announces ETH Holdings Reach Unprecedented World Record of 5.078 Million Tokens, and Total Crypto and Total Cash Holdings of $13.3 Billion
data.description: Bitmine currently holds a substantial 4.21% share of the total supply of ETH coins, which amounts to 120.7 million coins. In a span of just 10 months, Bitmine has managed to reach 84% towards achieving the 'Alchemy of 5%'. The growth of Ethereum is being supported by two major factors - the movement of Wall Street towards tokenization on the blockchain and the rising demand for agentic AI systems.

data.title: Big Digital Energy, Inc. Announces Colocation Agreement with the Endeavor Group
data.description: The upcoming transaction is anticipated to maximize capacity, boost revenue growth in the near future, and enhance cash flows. This move will showcase the management's dedication to shareholders.

data.title: ReloQuest Earns Top Honors as Best OTA / Online Accommodation Booking Platform at The Shortyz 2026
data.description: A prestigious global platform for extended-stay and corporate accommodation booking, ReloQuest, based in Weston, Fla., was recently honored at the Shortyz 2026 Awards with the title of "Best OTA / Online Accommodation Booking Platform." This accolade is a significant achievement for the company, acknowledging its industry-leading position and prowess in the online accommodation booking sector. The Shortyz Awards, regarded as a highly esteemed recognition in the field, highlight the excellence of businesses and professionals contributing to the accommodation industry.

data.title: Jones Appoints Kevin Dede, as Managing Director, Equity Research
data.description: Los Angeles and New York, April 27, 2026 - An announcement was made today by JonesTrading Institutional Services LLC (Jones) regarding the appointment of Kevin Dede as the new Managing Director of Equity Research. Mr. Dede is set to concentrate on disruptive innovation, specifically covering companies and technologies within this sector. This move highlights Jones's strategic approach to enhancing its services in this rapidly evolving industry.

data.title: Distinctive Assets Honors Hollywood's Leading Moms
data.description: In anticipation of Mother's Day, the renowned entertainment marketing firm Distinctive Assets from Los Angeles is gearing up to provide extravagant presents. The company, known for kickstarting the trend of celebrity swag over two decades ago, will be creating and dispersing their iconic gifts as part of the celebration. This year marks their twenty-sixth anniversary in the industry, and they are set to deliver an array of luxurious items to commemorate the occasion.

data.title: Re/Max Stock Surges On News Of Sale To Tech Real Estate Firm
data.description: Stocks saw a significant increase of 17% before the market opened on Monday. The surge was propelled by the announcement of Re/Max being acquired by a tech real estate company. This news of the sale contributed to the positive movement in share prices.

data.title: Verizon Earnings Beat, Revenue Light As Subscriber Additions Surprise
data.description: The telecommunications company gained a larger number of high-spending "postpaid" phone subscribers than anticipated following the appointment of a new CEO. The post-Verizon earnings report revealed a beat in earnings but lighter revenue, with a surprising increase in subscriber additions.

data.title: Domino's Hit By Budget-Conscious Diners, Shares Tumble
data.description: Domino's Pizza Inc. (NASDAQ: DPZ) saw a decrease in premarket trading following the release of their first-quarter results which fell short of Wall Street predictions. Earnings stood at $4.13 per share, slightly below the anticipated $4.28 per share. Despite a 3.5% increase in revenue year over year to $1.151 billion, it was slightly below the expected $1.163 billion. The growth in sales was attributed to higher supply chain revenue, alongside boosts in global franchise royalties, fees, and advertising revenue. Income from operations also rose by 9.6% from the previous year to $230.4 million, driven by increased franchise royalties and gross margin dollar growth in the supply chain segment. On key metrics, global retail sales rose by 3.4% on a currency-neutral basis, with a 2.8% incline in U.S. stores and a 4.0% growth internationally. U.S. same-store sales saw a 0.9% rise, while international same-store sales dropped by 0.4%. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strategic Resources and Tyfast Energy Sign MOU to Build a Canadian Vanadium-to-Battery Pathway for Heavy-Duty Electrification
data.description: A partnership has been formed to assess vanadium oxide sourced from Canadian mines for its suitability in Tyfast's lithium vanadium oxide (LVO) anode. This collaboration, between entities based in Montreal, QC and San Diego, CA, is aimed at promoting mining and defense electrification efforts. The news was announced on April 27, 2026. Tyfast Energy Corp. is leading this initiative to explore the potential of utilizing battery-grade vanadium oxide in their LVO anode technology.

data.title: United Airlines proposed a merger with American, but was rejected. United's CEO confirmed the offer but American declined.
data.description: The Chief of United Airlines has admitted recently that he proposed a merger with American Airlines, although American Airlines was not open to the idea.
